hypothesis: On GER40 M5, a clean breakout of the Asia-session range (00:00-06:00 UTC) during the London window (07:00-10:00 UTC), with breakout distance >= 0.5 ATR, continues for at least 1.5R before failing, when the Asia range is between 0.5 and 2.0 ATR.

entry_rules.long: during 07:00-10:00 UTC AND close > asia_high + 0.5*ATR14 AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR14
entry_rules.short: during 07:00-10:00 UTC AND close < asia_low  - 0.5*ATR14 AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR14
entry_rules.one_shot: Only first qualifying breakout per day; cooldown = rest of session after entry.

regime_filter.comment: Skip days with pre-expanded or dead Asia ranges.

exit_rules.sl: opposite side of Asia range (i.e. for long: asia_low - 0.1*ATR)
